normalization.notes: Store Shavian text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Do not auto-convert English spelling into Shavian without a reviewed transcription policy.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Shavian consonant letters, vowel letters, compound vowels, dialect-sensitive phonemic contrasts, and word chunks
segmentation.notes: Shavian maps English sounds rather than standard spelling. Each shipped anchor needs a chosen pronunciation model and reviewer-approved transcription.

sources.license: Unicode License reviewed for metadata use
sources.notes: Shavian code point metadata and letter names. Use as infrastructure metadata only.
Rendering and fallback test source. Not a text corpus.

sources.license: terms require review before derived use
sources.notes: Discovery source for conventions and teaching order. Do not copy examples without license review.

sources.notes: Useful for English anchor utility only. Shavian spellings must be app-authored and reviewed.
Short phonemic examples authored by Glyphin and reviewed against the chosen Shavian transcription policy.
